summary: Phase 52 Performance Optimization Testing: Verified shell render, session cache, parallel API calls, and skeleton loading. ESLint passes for both TemplateEditor.js and GenerateDocumentWizard.js. Template Editor shell renders with header/tabs before PDF loads. Session cache hydration reduces second-visit load time from ~6s to ~2s. Field placements render correctly in Visual Builder. Minor issue: parseFields API returns 500 (non-blocking, handled gracefully).

minor.issue: Returns 500 'Failed to process PDF: Unable to download PDF from URL' - non-blocking, handled via Promise.allSettled

integration_issues.issue: Route shows 'Module Disabled' for test@gmail.com tenant - may be expected behavior based on module entitlements

critical_code_review_comments: TemplateEditor.js loadTemplate(): Correctly implements 4-phase loading - Phase 1 (metadata) blocks shell, Phase 4 (PDF) runs in parallel with skeleton, Phase 2 (versions/fields/blocks) uses Promise.allSettled, Phase 3 (CRM) is non-blocking
TemplateEditor.js: Session cache key 'docflow_tpl_cache:{id}' correctly hydrates templateData, fieldPlacements, contentBlocks on second visit
TemplateEditor.js: pdfLoading state drives skeleton display with data-testid='visual-builder-skeleton'
GenerateDocumentWizard.js loadTemplate(): Session cache hydration sets loading=false immediately, then re-fetches in background (stale-while-revalidate pattern)
GenerateDocumentWizard.js: Version history loads in background via non-awaited promise
Both files pass ESLint with no issues

success_rate.frontend: 90% (7/8 tests passed - GenerateDocumentWizard route access issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 52 performance optimizations verified. Key findings: (1) Template Editor shell renders in ~6s first visit, ~2s cached visit - session cache working. (2) Visual Builder shows skeleton while PDF loads. (3) Field placements (4 fields) render correctly. (4) Validation state tracking works. (5) ESLint passes for both files. (6) GenerateDocumentWizard route /docflow/generate-document shows 'Module Disabled' for test tenant - this may be expected based on module entitlements, but the code implementation is correct.

regression_checks.signing_flows: Not tested (no active signing sessions available)
regression_checks.field_linking: Code verified - fieldKey sync logic intact
